common.tagline: The complete Jellyfin media stack, auto-configured.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: All your media apps, at a glance.
dashboard.detected: {count, plural, =0 {No apps detected yet} one {# app detected} other {# apps detected}}

empty.title: No JellyStack apps installed yet
empty.description: Head over to your Umbrel App Store to install the JellyStack apps you want to use.

viewer.error: Could not load this app. It may be starting up.

wizard.title: Welcome to JellyStack
wizard.subtitle: We'll wire your apps together in a few clicks.

welcome.heading: Let's get your stack online
welcome.body: JellyStack will now detect every bundled service and walk you through the handful of settings that actually need a decision from you.
welcome.detected: {count, plural, =0 {No services detected yet} one {# service detected} other {# services detected}}

secrets.heading: API keys
secrets.body: Most bundled apps generate their own API key on first run. We just read them back so you never have to copy-paste anything.

prowlarr.heading: Connect Prowlarr to your *arr suite
prowlarr.body: Prowlarr becomes the single place where you manage indexers. We register Sonarr, Radarr, Lidarr and Readarr with it so new indexers propagate automatically.

paths.heading: Pre-configure media paths
paths.body: We tell each *arr app where its library lives on disk: movies at /data/media/movies, TV at /data/media/tv, and so on.

qbit.heading: Register download clients
qbit.body: We add qBittorrent (and SABnzbd, if present) as download clients on every *arr app, with matching categories so each kind of media lands in its own folder.

recipeCommon.readyToRun: Ready to run. This action is idempotent — re-running it won't duplicate anything.

done.heading: You're all set
done.body: Your JellyStack is wired up. You can always re-run the wizard from the Settings page.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Everything JellyStack needs to know about your setup. No terminal required.
settings.placeholder: Detailed settings screens are on their way. For now, these are the sections JellyStack will grow into.

vpn.label: VPN (Gluetun)
vpn.hint: Mullvad WireGuard credentials, kill-switch, provider choice.

paths.label: Media paths
paths.hint: Where movies, TV, music, books and audiobooks live on disk.

users.label: Users
users.hint: Invite friends and family to Jellyfin through Wizarr.

language.label: Language
language.hint: Changes the panel language. Apps remain in their own language.

notFound.title: This page doesn't exist
notFound.body: The link you followed may be outdated, or the app id is unknown.
